'''Greater Marianas''' was a little known dust-swept planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] some time before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. It contained at least one [[Unidentified settlement (Greater Marianas)|settlement]] of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and was also home to the [[yaggie]], a creature hunted for its skin and meat.

It was deemed unnecessary to require a permanent Imperial garrison in place while an imposed tax requiring revenue to be collected mid and end of season was maintained.

{{Planet-stub}}
